metadata.name: Explain Closing Costs to a First-Time Buyer

description: A first-time home buyer is confused by the list of closing costs on their loan estimate. Their agent must explain the different fees.

nodes.task_description: Review the buyer's Loan Estimate document.

expected_outcome.value: Agent is familiar with the specific figures and fees listed.

nodes.task_description: Explain each major closing cost, such as lender fees, title insurance, appraisal fee, and pre-paid items (taxes, insurance).

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a clear, line-by-line explanation of the costs.

nodes.task_description: Advise the buyer to compare the Loan Estimate with the final Closing Disclosure to ensure there are no major changes.

expected_outcome.value: The buyer understands how to review their final closing documents.
